steps.title: Read the line of best fit
steps.content: The shown line rises from left to right, so the slope is positive. It also crosses the $y$-axis above $0$, around $3.4$, so the $y$-intercept is positive.

steps.title: Match slope and intercept signs
steps.content: Only $y=x+3.4$ has both a positive slope and a positive $y$-intercept. Choice B has the wrong intercept sign, and choices C and D have negative slope. Therefore choice A is correct.
